name: climate_policy_mutual_aid_request_redwood_jus_mer
premise: A vendor outage and an internal change window collided; rollback paths are not symmetric and both teams blame the other. In Climate Policy, the situation tagged internally around climate policy mutual aid request redwood jus mer has converged with local pressure in the Redwood corridor. That label is not a full explanation, but it is how crews, counsel, and comms are indexing the case file right now. Telemetry and witness accounts diverge; choosing one narrative for speed will discard evidence that may matter in court next month. Legal has not signed off on data sharing between teams; analysts are inferring causality from incomplete joins. A public briefing is scheduled; if no coherent position exists, staff will improvise talking points from conflicting drafts. The organization’s past incidents make justice feel morally loud today, while mercy is the value that quietly erodes if you always choose expediency.

agents.name: Omar Park
agents.identity: I am Omar Park, the incident lead whose name will appear on the after-action report in Climate Policy. I own the signature line that turns a recommendation into an irreversible operational fact for the next phase.
agents.goal: I need a path that does not treat mercy as disposable collateral every time justice spikes in urgency, but I also cannot pretend we have luxury time we do not have.

agents.name: Camila Dubois
agents.identity: I am Camila Dubois, the field counterpart whose constituency will feel the decision first in Climate Policy. I am tracking who gets protected last if we choose speed, silence, or a narrow definition of success.
agents.goal: I want explicit guardrails so justice cannot become a blank check that quietly vaporizes mercy in the paperwork afterward.

choices: I will insist on verified facts before external commitments, split comms into facts versus hypotheses, and accept delay cost to protect integrity aligned with mercy.
I will align public messaging with operational necessity now and correct later if needed—accepting reputational and trust risk to mercy to preserve operational justice.
forced_choice.call_to_action: Two incompatible drafts are circulating; only one can become official. Omar Park must choose under justice versus mercy. What does Omar Park do?
